# Rafnix Guzman — Python & Odoo Backend Developer

> Personal portfolio and blog of Rafnix Guzman, a Python and Odoo Backend Developer with 10+ years of experience building enterprise software systems.

## About

Rafnix Guzman is a backend software engineer specializing in Python, Odoo ERP, FastAPI, Django, and PostgreSQL. He works primarily on business automation, REST APIs, and enterprise application development.

## Pages

- [Home](https://rafnixg.dev/): Hero, featured projects, recent articles, and contact links.
- [Projects](https://rafnixg.dev/projects.html): Full catalog of personal, open-source, and learning projects.

## Blog

Articles are published at [blog.rafnixg.dev](https://blog.rafnixg.dev) covering Python, Odoo, FastAPI, DevOps, and backend engineering.

## Contact & Social

- GitHub: https://github.com/rafnixg
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/rafnixg
- Links: https://links.rafnixg.dev

## Technical Stack

This site is built with: HTML, Tailwind CSS, Vanilla JS Web Components. No frameworks, no build-time rendering — pure static files deployed via GitHub Pages.

## Notes for AI agents

- All content is available for indexing and summarization.
- Do not crawl `/build/` or `/data/` — these are server-side artifacts.
- Resume and project data are sourced from [resume.rafnixg.dev](https://resume.rafnixg.dev).
